targets.name: presence-backend
targets.branch: feature/presence-ecosystem-alpha local HEAD and pushed branch
targets.protection: public production smoke required no bypass

targets.name: presence-frontend
targets.protection: public production smoke required no bypass

env_audit.note: The pulled frontend env audit copy continued to redact public frontend env bodies as empty-looking quoted values; provider update and hosted behavior were used as proof.

db_migration_proof.backup_restore_plan: Record Supabase backup or PITR restore point before future hosted SQL migration; restore through provider path rather than destructive reset.

blocker_resolution.api_halls_500_root_cause: Hosted Vercel log showed psycopg2 UndefinedTable for relation presence_hall on the failing production surface.
blocker_resolution.api_halls_fix_result: Current hosted schema inventory contains Gardens/Halls tables and current production backend returns canonical 200 Hall list envelope.
blocker_resolution.auth_hardening_result: Hosted invalid Garden bearer now returns canonical 401.
blocker_resolution.control_token_expiry_result: Hosted authenticated World readiness succeeds after UTC-naive expiry normalization.

fixture_family: public hall zones portal stall session path

bugs_fixed: Presence invalid bearer aliases return canonical 401 hosted auth behavior.
Control-token grant expiry comparison normalizes hosted aware timestamps.
Owner draft Hall smoke uses studio_hall and archives the fixture draft.
Frontend hosted sign-in configured gate added after production auth env redeploy.
Backend smoke now covers private surfaces, moderation report, and public Hall participant privacy.
remaining_limitations: Controlled launch does not make World or V2 ready.
Firefox and WebKit hosted smoke remain to run when Playwright browsers or devices are available.
Supabase DB log-console and external monitoring proof remain observability follow-up.
Enquiry/contact routing must be confirmed for each selected pilot Room before it is promised active.
launch_start_steps: Freeze tested production aliases and deployment IDs.
Select first pilot and record package, pricing, support owner, rollback owner, Room scope, and Hall scope.
Verify hosted auth, Studio, public Room, RoomKey NFC or QR, and analytics during supervised onboarding.
Enable enquiry/contact only after selected Room routing is confirmed.
Keep World hidden/forming and keep V2 previews non-production.
Rerun hosted backend and Chromium smoke after any env, deployment, DB, fixture, or auth-policy change.
